name: Divergent Energy Services Corp.
summary: Divergent Energy Services Corp. provides artificial lift products and services to clients in the oil and gas industry in Canada and the United States. The company offers electric submersible and progressing cavity pump systems. It is also involved in developing linear electromagnetic submersible pumps. The company was formerly known as Canadian Oilfield Solutions Corp. and changed its name to Divergent Energy Services Corp. in June 2014. Divergent Energy Services Corp. is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
